---
title: "About"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/leonnoirclerc
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:l.noirclerc@aion-tech.ai
---

Leon Noirclerc. BSc in Communication Systems at EPFL, MSc in Data Science at ETH Zürich with a focus on machine learning.

I use this blog to present personal projects, experiments, and thinking.
